creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text: I confirmed that removing ONLY_FOR_ARCH means a build will be attempted on all architectures (a package for aarch64 won't be attempted because it's currently marked broken) and pkg.freebsd.org currently supports aarch64 amd64 armv6 and i386 right now.  The patch at https://reviews.freebsd.org/D9541 was confirmed correct by a few developers, so I will commit it.
